steps.title: Locate the key conclusion
steps.content: The passage states: “greater proximity alone can't explain the difference in park use.” This explicit statement directly answers what point the text makes about the difference in park usage between the two cities.

steps.title: Match the conclusion to the choices
steps.content: The difference must be caused by something other than proximity — which is what choice D says. Choices A, B, and C introduce unsupported claims about researcher expectations, historical sources, or data inaccuracy. That matches choice D — D is correct.
